items.docs: Submit a Verify request to perform a KYC verification on a person. Trulioo selects the appropriate local datasources for the country specified in the `CountryCode` field, matches the supplied identity fields, and returns a normalized VerifyResult.

params.name: transactionRecordId
params.description: TransactionRecordID returned by a previous Verify call.

items.docs: Retrieve the full TransactionRecord for a previously executed Verify. Includes Record, DatasourceResults, and any AppendedFields returned by the datasources.

params.name: transactionRecordId
params.description: TransactionRecordID returned by a previous Verify call.

items.docs: Retrieve a transaction record including cleansed-address details.

params.name: transactionId
params.description: TransactionID returned by a previous Verify call.

items.docs: Get the current status of an asynchronous verification transaction identified by its TransactionID.

params.name: transactionRecordId
params.description: TransactionRecordID returned by a previous Verify call.

items.docs: Retrieve partial results from an in-flight verification — useful when some datasources have returned but others are still processing.

params.name: transactionRecordId
params.description: TransactionRecordID returned by a previous Verify call.

params.name: fieldName
params.description: Name of the document field to retrieve.

items.docs: Download an evidence document image (e.g. captured ID front, ID back, selfie) returned by a verification.
